resources.description.code: Unique resource code used for authorization checks and resource registration
resources.title.name: Resource Name
resources.description.name: Administrative resource name
resources.description.alias: Preferred display name used in assignment and identification views
resources.title.title: Title Key
resources.description.title: I18n key used for page or navigation display
resources.title.label: Display Name
resources.description.label: Default display name of the resource
resources.description.type: Resource type: group, module, page, feature, operation, or API
resources.description.parentId: Parent resource of the current resource
resources.description.pluginId: Plugin or module that declares this resource
resources.description.path: Frontend route path or external link
resources.description.component: Frontend component identifier, remote component, or external: link
resources.description.routeKind: Navigation render kind such as item, submenu, group, or divider
resources.description.publicAccess: Allows access without explicit assignment when enabled
resources.description.requireOrgTenant: Prevents access from personal tenants when enabled
resources.description.grantable: Whether this resource can be assigned to roles or applications
resources.description.disabled: Disabled resources are excluded from routing and authorization
resources.description.danger: Marks the resource as sensitive in operations or navigation
